reason_for_call: Triage email and draft a reply

reply_points: Apologize for the delayed response while I was traveling
Confirm the XG-200 tank monitor now supports Bluetooth syncing
Say the latest spec sheet lists 18-month battery life
Mention current lead time is about 2 weeks
Offer to send the full spec sheet and answer follow-up questions

attributes.subject: Updated info on the XG-200 tank monitor?
attributes.body: Hi Vanessa, following up to see if you have the latest product details on the XG-200 tank monitor. Specifically I need to confirm whether Bluetooth syncing is included now, what the battery life is on the newest version, and what lead times look like at the moment. Thanks.

attributes.subject: Re: Demo pricing for fleet sensors
attributes.body: Thanks for the pricing notes last month. I'll circle back after I talk with my team.

attributes.subject: Route paperwork reminder
attributes.body: Please upload the signed delivery sheet when you're back in range.
